---
title: 'Praying for you'
date: '2011-10-04T01:59:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2906473097758492586'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/praying-for-you.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Prayer'
---

I was thinking about you today... I love you as a daughter... I'm praying for your protection and empowerment. God will put the&nbsp;pieces&nbsp;together. Darrell
